negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing combined async collection telemetry producer: no combined_parallel_simulation/combined_post_filter phases, scheduled/regular counts, aggregate async stats, or capObservations are emitted by payload building.
related_but_insufficient_code: Metrics/RPC structs include cap_observations on BlockBuildAttemptTrace and BlockBuildAttemptDebug.
No payload-builder combined async simulation phases, cap observation construction, or record_block_build_attempt call was found.

rationale: The current telemetry state is the later combined-phase and cap-observation model: earlier subsection and legacy per-lane phase candidates are folded into one combined simulation/post-filter trace with category counts, aggregate async stats, and cap observations.
statement: Async collection telemetry reports aggregate stats, deadline and outcome fields, one combined_parallel_simulation phase, one combined_post_filter phase, scheduled and regular category counts on combined phases, and block-build capObservations for every observed cap saturation including non-demotable AsyncSims caps.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build a payload with both scheduled and regular async candidates and assert the trace has exactly one combined_parallel_simulation and one combined_post_filter phase with tx_count equal to scheduledTxCount plus regularTxCount.
Force scheduled and total async simulation cap saturation and assert ritual_getBlockBuildTrace exposes capObservations with observed, limit, elapsedMicros, and causedDemotion=false for AsyncSims.
summary: Async collection combined-phase trace behavior is absent end-to-end.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Build with scheduled and regular async candidates and query ritual_getBlockBuildTrace; current port has schema fields but no producer path to populate combined phases/cap observations.
title: Async collection traces use combined phases and cap observations
